name: Color Force II 72 Plus

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: D468A91C-4E1B-11EF-B3CE-525400685065

comment:
Color Force II 72 Plus boasts enhanced brightness and a richer palette while maintaining the same form factor and character as the market-leading original. The innovative optical system with individually controlled pixels provides smooth, beautiful, and even coverage for any cyc or surface with no unsightly color shadowing.

Designed for a boasts enhanced brightness and a richer palette, while maintaining the same form factor and character as the market-leading original variety of applications where powerful and precise lighting is essential, including cyc, flood, and wall washing up to 12m.
